title: Rena's Armor Patch
description: Bring the Armor Models up to spec!
body:
![Rena's Armor Patch Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8de179f111b6fc741254e62bc6181d0acba2039.png)

# What is this pack?
This pack fixes the scaling on armor- making it smaller and less bloated- along with also converting the uv maps to be using the more modern 1.8 format for humanoid textures! 

This originally part of an upcoming pack I will be releasing soon...but I wanted the general public to get their hands on these new models!

![GIF Demonstrating the differences between the armor models.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dhS7MKJK/images/25bb06753ae43f126be46cab19a25b1f0d51fdd6.gif)

## Built-in Support

- Wild Fire's Female Gender Mod [[Modrinth Link]](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)

## Pack Features

- Smaller armor models.
- New texture format which allows for mismatched limbs! (1.8 Skin Update)
- Overlay textures for armor, allowing you to have more depth on the textures!
- Converted textures for all of the armor types!
- Custom models for piglin helmets!

## Upcoming Features

- Custom model for _Slim_ skins (Alex body)
- Seperated textures for each mob's armor? (Will cause bloat)


![Person in Leather Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dhS7MKJK/images/f049e1c05e71604e5a26b078bed7cb6359223a2d_350.webp)
